audience: students, startups, team leaders, product managers
title: ApexPM (Agile Dashboard)
summary: A native Android team project management application built with Kotlin and Java, featuring real-time Firestore Kanban boards, profile achievements, and email-based invite flows.
overview: ApexPM (formerly Your-PM-Project-Manager) is a comprehensive native Android software system designed to track team deliverables. Built with standard Android SDK, XML layouts, and dynamic Firebase integration, it supports real-time project creation, interactive board views, and a local code/document viewer. Team members can easily invite collaborators via email, configure profile dashboards, track achievements, and maintain files offline.
longDescription: ApexPM is a production-grade, native Android collaborative system built for modern engineering teams and students. Developed with Kotlin and Java, the application connects directly to Cloud Firestore to sync task cards, boards, and project timelines across team devices instantly. Key architectural components include full-featured Firebase Authentication for secure profiles, offline connection fail-safes via NoInternet states, and an achievements activity to incentivize team tasks. The app also includes specialized modules like an integrated code and note viewer, making it an excellent dual-panel reference (Admin + User layout) for final-year presentations.
features: Kanban Board Sync: Real-time interactive drag-and-drop simulated task state updates connected directly to Firestore
Team Invitation Flow: Seamless email-based collaborator onboarding managing invitation lists
Achievements Dashboard: In-app engagement workspace celebrating team contributions
Dual-Panel Layout: Complete administration control flow mapped dynamically for managers and team members
Integrated Code Viewer: Offline-ready text viewer displaying custom source code briefs inside project cards
Rich Notes Viewer: Fully integrated documentation module letting members create and read project guides
Offline Detection Gate: Modern NoInternet detection screen pausing database streams gracefully
XML Material Layouts: Highly polished Android layout designs utilizing modern card structures and transitions
Secure Preferences: Gradle-configured local states holding session credentials securely
Firebase Firestore rules: Detailed document hierarchy restricting boards to verified invitees only
deliverables: Android Studio Kotlin & Java project source code
User manual and presentation project structures
